inputs.title: Fix duplicate task creation on webhook retry
inputs.description: ClickUp webhook retries can create duplicate harness tasks when delivery idempotency is missing across daemon ticks.

context.evidence: Two tasks share the same external id after a transient 502.

rubric.criterion: Investigation cites retry behavior and duplicate task evidence.
Adds regression coverage for idempotent ingest on repeated delivery.

provenance.source: Redacted multi-file bugfix with connector and daemon interaction.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized from representative completed runs; no single source task id archived.
